Syringes used were from a plastic sealed one. Fresh gloves used, then discarded in discard bag alongwith syringe and deposited in waste basket. After a gap, second time again required so called them again. This time a girl is sent, who continuously talking on the phone whilst working. The arm band pinchd the arm till blood clot formed and hurtful.  Needle used from an open plastic container-unsealed. Pre-used, torn, dirty gloves used. On query if the technician team didn't know in advance how much was required, and if proper technician couldn't be sent, he starts yelling before confirmation that we are telling lies. He comes to our house, then sends the girl to our house yelling that we're wrong. Printout given half only. 4500+4500+7500 including three home visit charges, making us feel as if free services taken so we have to putup with dadagiri.

reviews.text:
My fiancé and I engaged Photizo Studio for our pre-wedding photoshoot. Through recommendation, we approached them. As the wedding season was in full swing, despite the heavily booked dates, I cannot thank enough Alhhadh and his team to fit us in and doing such a great job. I heard they covered a wedding at the same shoot location until 1AM the previous night and the team was ready for our shoot sharp at 5.30 AM the next morning. Alhhadh and Sanil captured our photos. Considering the proximity of our marriage date, they went above and beyond for their customers and delivered us the edited pics within 2 days after the shoot in spite of their tight schedule.

Main highlights from our experience with Photizo:

1. We felt at ease during the photoshoot as the Photizo team was very friendly and accommodating with our requests.
2. They did an excellent job in capturing the morning highlights. The entire team is very talented and worked well with each other. Kudos for the punctuality, patience and prompt reply on our needs
3. The team knew how to take natural angles that made the photos turn out very nice!
4. The final editing is absolutely stunning and not to say their package prices are really reasonable and affordable for the effort they put in. We received many compliments on our pre-wed shoot photos!
5. We like their attitude in experimenting and trying out new ideas and accepting customer feedback.

From start to finish - amazing service!
The professionalism and quality of work is greatly appreciated.
For sure, they deserve my feedbacks and recommendation!!!

We had the absolute pleasure of having Avinash as our wedding photographer.

Amazing Experience! Perfect Baby and Maternity Photos!

I cannot recommend Wedlock Blossom enough for their incredible work in capturing the most precious moments of my baby! From start to finish, the experience was seamless and professional. The photographers Supriya nad Tejas were so patient and skilled at working with infants, making sure my little one was comfortable and happy throughout the session.

The attention to detail was outstanding—from the adorable props to the perfect lighting, every shot was beautifully composed. They truly captured my baby’s personality and those tiny, fleeting details that I never want to forget.

The final photos were beyond my expectations! The quality, clarity, and creativity in each image were stunning. I’m so grateful to have these memories preserved so beautifully.

If you’re looking for a photo studio that delivers exceptional baby photos, look no further than Wedlock Blossom. They are worth every penny! Thank you for giving us timeless treasures we’ll cherish forever!

Highly recommended for anyone looking for professional, thoughtful, and high-quality wedding photography and videography!
